code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut have_max = false
  mut max_val = 0

  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_space = false
    if at_end
      is_space = true
    else
      let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
      let b = match b_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      end
    end

    if is_space
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            if not have_max
              max_val = v
              have_max = true
            else if v > max_val
              max_val = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      let b_opt2 = string.byte_at(line, i)
      let b2 = match b_opt2
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b2)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if have_max
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
